{{Quote|One more time Gorug. Once more, and you walk the lock.|Xhaxin warns Gorug|<ref name="Pirates & Privateers">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref>}}
'''Gorug''' was a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who served as a soldier on the modified [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]], the ''[[Free Lance]]'', commanded by [[Urias Xhaxin]].

On a number of occasions, he was reprimanded by Xhaxin for accosting prisoners. On one such occasion, he was strangling the captive [[Missa]], a noble of the [[House Indupar]]. Gorug wanted her jewels to give to his [[Matron/Legends|matron]]. When warned off, Gorug challenged Xhaxin to combat—an event that had occurred a number of times before. Xhaxin let him run into the bulkhead wall, and once stunned, held a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] to his throat and threatened to throw him out an air lock if he challenged him again.
